cards.name: Maria
cards.text: The food here is absolutely delicious, especially the shashlik! The service was fast and friendly. I will definitely come back again.

cards.name: Alex
cards.text: A great place for family dinners. The ambiance is cozy, and the staff is very attentive. Highly recommended for everyone!

cards.name: John
cards.text: Probably the best burger I've had in a long time. The quality of ingredients is top-notch. Great value for money.
